UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APARICIO, PATRICIA $6,153.62 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,448.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100050492)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-05-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
